code: {/*Elementos necesarios.*/}import React,{useState}from'react';import ScrollListener from'./components/ScrollListener';{/*Elementos constantes y array de objetos necesarios.*/}import{tabs,smallLayers,mediumLayers,largeLayers}from'./constants';{/*Elementos adicionales.*/}import CustomTitleBar from'./components/CustomTitleBar';import CustomFooterButtons from'./components/CustomFooterButtons';import CustomScrollProgressBar from'./components/CustomScrollProgressBar';import CustomParallax from'./components/CustomParallax';import CustomTab from'./components/CustomTab';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){{/*Definimos el scrollPercentage*/}const[scrollPercentage,setScrollPercentage]=useState(0);const handleScroll=percentage=>{setScrollPercentage(percentage);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"App",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ScrollListener,{onScroll:handleScroll}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("header",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CustomTitleBar,{title:"Federico Garcia Barreiro"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{id:"section-0",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CustomParallax,{scrollPercentage:scrollPercentage,largeLayers:largeLayers,mediumLayers:mediumLayers,smallLayers:smallLayers})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CustomTab,{tabs:tabs}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("footer",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CustomFooterButtons,{scrollPercentage:scrollPercentage}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CustomScrollProgressBar,{scrollPercentage:scrollPercentage})]})]});}export default App;
